reasoning: User asked specifically about last-mile access to Shirakawa-go (bus-only, train connections). Server returned prefecture overview listing Shirakawa-go among many hubs with coords but no bus routes, no transfer timing. reasoning: Found Kamogawa Delta and Kamogawa Park (good for sunset walk) plus iconic landmarks block. However nothing on reasonable ryokan / lodging — query had two parts. Authoritative data but second half (ryokan) absent.

reasoning: Peace Memorial Museum, Peace Memorial Park, Peace Memorial Hall present (good). But response heavily dominated by nav-chrome municipal pages (観光・文化・スポーツ, 多文化共生 etc.) — buries the actual peace sites under noisy admin pages. Rule B: ranking failure single dim hit (expression_quality).

reasoning: Query in Korean — response in Japanese/English (description_en field, no ko translation). Per Rule D constraint_handling -1. Nachi-no-Taki found, Nachi-taisha, Nachi 48 falls, Nachi forest all present (intent good). Authoritative entities.
